TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Talamakau, title = Talamakau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talamakau} }

S.FORM: Talamakau Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Talamakau a niyaro', 229 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 757 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 718 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 39 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Rukai85%, Paiwan5%, Bunun1%, Amis2%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: taɾamakao~u~u itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u taɾamakao~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ro~u~ukai**%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Talamakau Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Talamakau a niyaro', 229 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 757 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 95% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 718 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 5% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 39 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Rukai85%, Paiwan5%, Bunun1%, Amis2%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: taɾamakao~u~u itiniaj i sanɬ~ɮimən ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u taɾamakao~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ro~u~ukai**%, paiwan*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
